---
title: "nitrix.stats.hgp"
generated: true
signature-hash: c99a13fa70b5ca63
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.hgp`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `K2` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `K` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `g` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `HGPResult` {#HGPResult}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:HGPResult -->
```python
class HGPResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:HGPResult -->
Per-element hierarchical-GP fit output (HSGP engine, `'GS'` model).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:HGPResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(coef: Float[Array, 'V p'], cov_unscaled: Float[Array, 'V p p'], theta: Float[Array, 'V K2'], log_mlik: Float[Array, 'V'], edf: Float[Array, 'V K'], dispersion: Float[Array, 'V'], kernel: str, engine: str, model: str, n_levels: Any, n_obs: int, rank: int, n_fixed: int, lo: float, hi: float, boundary: float) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `hgp_fit` {#hgp_fit}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:hgp_fit -->
```python
hgp_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], x: Float[Array, ' N'], group: Int[Array, ' N'], *, group_inner: Optional[Int[Array, ' N']] = None, parametric: Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']] = None, kernel: str = 'matern52', rank: int = 12, model: str = 'GS', boundary: float = 1.5, bounds: Optional[Tuple[float, float]] = None, rho_bounds: Optional[Tuple[float, float]] = None, n_rho: int = 24, map_rho: Optional[Callable[[Float[Array, '']], Float[Array, '']]] = None, n_levels: Optional[int] = None, n_levels_inner: Optional[int] = None, n_outer: int = 30, n_search: int = 15, ridge: float = 1e-08, lam_floor: float = 1e-06, lam_ceil: float = 100000000.0, block: Optional[int] = None) -> HGPResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:hgp_fit -->
Fit a mass-univariate hierarchical GP: a population smooth plus group-level
smooth deviations sharing a kernel (the "GS" hierarchical GAM; HSGP engine).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:hgp_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Y` | `Float` | `V` × `N` | — | `(V, N)` responses. |
| `x` | `Float` | `N` | — | `(N,)` covariate the GP smooths *over* (a single covariate, **not** the full design matrix `X`; linear covariates go to `parametric=`). |
| `group` | `Int` | `N` | — | `(N,)` integer factor labels `0 .. L-1` (the grouping the smooth varies over -- subjects, sites, ...). For `model='nested'` this is the **outer** factor. |
| `group_inner` | `Optional[Int[Array, ' N']]` | — | `None` | `(N,)` integer labels of the **inner** factor (nested within `group`), `0 .. L2-1` globally. Required for `model='nested'`. |
| `parametric` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']]` | — | `None` | Optional `(N, q)` unpenalised linear design (with the intercept). |
| `kernel` | `str` | — | `'matern52'` | HSGP basis parameters (see :func:`nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`); `rank` is the per-smooth eigenfunction count (default `12` -- the design is `1 + L` smooths wide, so a smaller rank than `gp_fit` is usual). |
| `rank` | `int` | — | `12` | HSGP basis parameters (see :func:`nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`); `rank` is the per-smooth eigenfunction count (default `12` -- the design is `1 + L` smooths wide, so a smaller rank than `gp_fit` is usual). |
| `model` | `str` | — | `'GS'` | Hierarchical structure. `'GS'` (default): a global smoother plus group-level smoothers with one shared group wiggliness `sigma_grp^2`. `'nested'`: a two-level hierarchy `(gp \| g1/g2)` -- population + outer-group + inner-group(nested) GP deviations, three variance components (`sigma_pop^2`, `sigma_outer^2`, `sigma_inner^2`) sharing `rho`. |
| `boundary` | `float` | — | `1.5` | HSGP basis parameters (see :func:`nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`); `rank` is the per-smooth eigenfunction count (default `12` -- the design is `1 + L` smooths wide, so a smaller rank than `gp_fit` is usual). |
| `bounds` | `Optional[Tuple[float, float]]` | — | `None` | HSGP basis parameters (see :func:`nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`); `rank` is the per-smooth eigenfunction count (default `12` -- the design is `1 + L` smooths wide, so a smaller rank than `gp_fit` is usual). |
| `rho_bounds` | `Optional[Tuple[float, float]]` | — | `None` | Shared-lengthscale search (as :func:`~nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`); `map_rho` is an optional `rho -> -log p(rho)` lengthscale prior (e.g. a builder from :mod:`nitrix.stats.priors`). |
| `n_rho` | `int` | — | `24` | Shared-lengthscale search (as :func:`~nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`); `map_rho` is an optional `rho -> -log p(rho)` lengthscale prior (e.g. a builder from :mod:`nitrix.stats.priors`). |
| `map_rho` | `Optional[Callable[[Float[Array, '']], Float[Array, '']]]` | — | `None` | Shared-lengthscale search (as :func:`~nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`); `map_rho` is an optional `rho -> -log p(rho)` lengthscale prior (e.g. a builder from :mod:`nitrix.stats.priors`). |
| `n_levels` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Outer / inner factor-level counts (default to `max + 1`); pass when a level is absent so the block widths are stable. |
| `n_levels_inner` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Outer / inner factor-level counts (default to `max + 1`); pass when a level is absent so the block widths are stable. |
| `n_outer` | `int` | — | `30` | Fellner-Schall / solver controls (as :func:`~nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`). |
| `n_search` | `int` | — | `15` | Fellner-Schall / solver controls (as :func:`~nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`). |
| `ridge` | `float` | — | `1e-08` | Fellner-Schall / solver controls (as :func:`~nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`). |
| `lam_floor` | `float` | — | `1e-06` | Fellner-Schall / solver controls (as :func:`~nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`). |
| `lam_ceil` | `float` | — | `100000000.0` | Fellner-Schall / solver controls (as :func:`~nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`). |
| `block` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Fellner-Schall / solver controls (as :func:`~nitrix.stats.gp.gp_fit`). |

**Returns** `HGPResult`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `hgp_predict` {#hgp_predict}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:hgp_predict -->
```python
hgp_predict(result: HGPResult, x_new: Float[Array, ' g'], *, levels: Optional[Int[Array, ' L']] = None, parametric: Optional[Float[Array, 'g q']] = None) -> Tuple[Float[Array, '...'], Float[Array, '...']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:hgp_predict -->
Posterior population (or per-group) curves at `x_new`.

With `levels=None` (default) returns the **population** smooth
`(mean, std)` -- each `(V, g)` -- the fixed effects plus `Phi(x_new)
beta_pop`.  With `levels` a sequence of group indices, returns the
**group** curves (population + that group's deviation) shaped
`(V, len(levels), g)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:hgp_predict -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `result` | `HGPResult` | — | — | An :class:`HGPResult` from :func:`hgp_fit`. |
| `x_new` | `Float` | `g` | — | `(g,)` covariate grid. |
| `levels` | `Optional[Int[Array, ' L']]` | — | `None` | Optional group indices to render; `None` gives the population curve. |
| `parametric` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'g q']]` | — | `None` | `(g, q)` parametric covariates (required if the fit used them). |

**Returns** `Tuple[Float[Array, '...'], Float[Array, '...']]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
